inputs.label: Net Sales Amount
inputs.businessContext: Total revenue from taxable sales before any tax or discounts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total revenue from taxable sales before any tax or discounts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Herhangi bir vergi veya indirim öncesi vergiye tabi satışlardan elde edilen toplam gelir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamterlös aus steuerpflichtigen Verkäufen vor Steuern oder Rabatten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu total des ventes imposables avant toute taxe ou remise.

inputs.label: Sales Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Combined state and local sales tax rate as a percentage.

label_i18n.es: Tasa de impuesto a las ventas

businessContext_i18n.en: Combined state and local sales tax rate as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yüzde olarak birleşik eyalet ve yerel satış vergisi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kombinierter staatlicher und lokaler Umsatzsteuersatz in Prozent.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux combiné de taxe de vente étatique et locale en pourcentage.

inputs.label: Exempt Sales Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of net sales that are tax-exempt (e.g., resale, non-profit).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of net sales that are tax-exempt (e.g., resale, non-profit).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergiden muaf olan net satışların yüzdesi (örneğin, yeniden satış, kar amacı gütmeyen).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Nettoumsatzes, der steuerbefreit ist (z. B. Weiterverkauf, gemeinnützig).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage des ventes nettes exonérées de taxe (ex. revente, organisme sans but lucratif).

inputs.label: Tax Jurisdiction
inputs.businessContext: Level of tax authority: state only, state+county, or state+county+city.

businessContext_i18n.en: Level of tax authority: state only, state+county, or state+county+city.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi otoritesi seviyesi: yalnızca eyalet, eyalet+ilçe veya eyalet+ilçe+şehir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ebene der Steuerbehörde: nur Staat, Staat+Kreis oder Staat+Kreis+Stadt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau d'autorité fiscale : état seulement, état+comté, ou état+comté+ville.

inputs.label: Sourcing Method
inputs.businessContext: Origin-based (seller's location) or destination-based (buyer's location) tax sourcing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Origin-based (seller's location) or destination-based (buyer's location) tax sourcing.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Menşe bazlı (satıcının konumu) veya varış bazlı (alıcının konumu) vergi kaynağı belirleme.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ursprungsbasiert (Standort des Verkäufers) oder zielbasiert (Standort des Käufers) Steuerquellen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sourcing basé sur l'origine (lieu du vendeur) ou sur la destination (lieu de l'acheteur).

inputs.label: Include Shipping in Taxable Base
inputs.businessContext: Whether shipping and handling charges are subject to sales tax.

label_i18n.fr: Inclure l'expédition dans la base imposable

businessContext_i18n.en: Whether shipping and handling charges are subject to sales tax.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nakliye ve elleçleme ücretlerinin satış vergisine tabi olup olmadığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ob Versand- und Bearbeitungskosten der Umsatzsteuer unterliegen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si les frais d'expédition et de manutention sont soumis à la taxe de vente.

inputs.label: Shipping & Handling Charge
inputs.businessContext: Total shipping and handling fees charged to customers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total shipping and handling fees charged to customers.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşterilere yansıtılan toplam nakliye ve elleçleme ücretleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Versand- und Bearbeitungsgebühren, die den Kunden berechnet werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des frais d'expédition et de manutention facturés aux clients.

rules.message: Exempt ratio must be between 0 and 100.
If shipping is not included, shipping charge must be zero to avoid double counting.

thresholds.message: Tax rate exceeds 12% – consider reviewing exemptions or sourcing strategy.
Exempt ratio > 50% – verify exemption documentation to avoid audit risk.
Net sales below $1,000 – tax calculation may be negligible.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
